name: Leeks in Olive Oil
recipeInstructions:
1. Trim the leeks by removing a few of the outer layers. Slice them about 3/4 inch thick, then discard the tough green leaves. Wash well in several changes of water.
2. In a heavy skillet, heat the olive oil over medium-low heat. Stir in the sliced leeks and carrots. Cover and cook gently for 30 minutes, shaking the skillet occasionally to prevent burning.
3. Blend in the remaining ingredients (rice, sugar, salt, lemon juice, and water) in order. Cover and simmer for another 30 minutes, checking the liquid level as needed by adding more water if necessary.
4. When fully cooked, the mixture should be very moist but not watery. Allow it to cool, then serve cold with additional lemon juice.
5. Serve as part of a buffet including other vegetable dishes.
